name: homarr
title: Homarr
description: Modern dashboard for managing and monitoring your server with Docker integration, service bookmarks, and system stats

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Homarr web interface

variables.name: SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY
variables.label: Encryption Key
variables.description: 64-character hex key for encrypting sensitive data. Leave blank to auto-generate.
